---
name: Landing Page Teardown Request
about: Intake for the USD 20 AI-assisted landing page teardown pack
title: "Teardown Request: "
labels: ["teardown-request"]
assignees: []
---

## URL

Paste the landing page URL here.

## What The Page Sells

Describe the product, service, or offer in one or two sentences.

## Primary Goal

What should a visitor do on this page?

Examples: book a call, start a trial, buy now, join a waitlist.

## Intended Audience

Who is the page for?

## Main Constraint Or Concern

What feels weakest right now?

Examples: unclear headline, low trust, weak CTA, too much text, vague offer.

## Notes

Add anything else that would help the teardown stay relevant.
